name: kalqy
description: Kalqy kids learning games — React PWA (Phaser/Three/MediaPipe) + NestJS API + Neon Postgres

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run start:dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
